title: elaeagnus angustifolia var. normalis
intro: Elaeagnus angustifolia var. normalis, also known as Russian olive or silver berry, is a deciduous shrub native to the steppes of Europe and Asia, known for its silvery-gray leaves and small, yellowish-green flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to have various medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. Consuming the berries of the Elaeagnus angustifolia var. normalis plant has been associated with several health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-diabetic, and anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and teas, which can be used to support digestive health and boost the immune system.
